findings.title: _propagate_to_context return type fix improves agent pipeline clarity
findings.description: Return type changed from Dict[str, Any] to None, making the agent's contract clearer

before.documentation: Returns: A new dictionary with propagated values

after.documentation: Mutates context in-place for backward compatibility with existing tests

impact_on_agent_accessibility.clarity_improvement: High - clear contract that mutation happens in-place
impact_on_agent_accessibility.type_checker_compat: Better - mypy can now verify correct usage
impact_on_agent_accessibility.ide_autocomplete: Better - no confusing return value expectation

findings.why_it_matters: Clear API contracts make agents easier to use and extend
findings.notes: Fix improves agent API clarity significantly

findings.title: Agent pipeline propagation simplified for better clarity
findings.description: run_agent_pipeline now calls _propagate_to_context directly without return value handling

before.understanding: Confusing - implies return value is important

after.understanding: Clear - mutation happens in-place, return value is None

impact_on_agent_accessibility.clarity_improvement: High - simpler to understand what propagation does

findings.why_it_matters: Simplified agent pipeline makes it easier to understand how agents interact

findings.title: All five agent classes have _propagate_to_context methods
findings.why_it_matters: Consistent propagation methods enable predictable agent pipeline behavior

findings.title: Agent pipeline uses getattr for optional _propagate_to_context
findings.description: Uses getattr with default to handle agents that may not have _propagate_to_context

defensive_pattern.condition: if propagate_method is not None and callable(propagate_method)

findings.why_it_matters: Defensive programming prevents runtime errors when extending agent pipeline

findings.title: Agent context mutation is documented as in-place for backward compatibility

documentation_pattern.statement: This method mutates the context in-place for backward compatibility with existing tests.
documentation_pattern.purpose: Explains why mutation happens and maintains test compatibility

findings.why_it_matters: Clear documentation of in-place mutation helps developers understand agent behavior

findings.title: Entry point detection uses well-documented constant

constant.name: MAX_ENTRY_POINTS
constant.documentation:
Chosen as a trade-off between completeness and output length:
- 5 entry points provide sufficient coverage for most projects
- Prevents overwhelming output when many files match keywords like "main", "app"

findings.why_it_matters: Documented constants help future maintainers understand design decisions

findings.title: Agent pipeline input validation is comprehensive

checks.error_handling: Returns error dict with missing keys
Returns error dict with invalid structure

findings.why_it_matters: Input validation prevents runtime errors and provides clear error messages

findings.title: Solution documentation explains agent propagation fix clearly

sections.problem: Describes both duplicate imports and return type issues
sections.symptoms: Shows code before fix with issues
sections.what_didnt_work: Explains initial assumptions and why they failed

findings.why_it_matters: Comprehensive documentation helps other developers understand the fix

recommendations: Return type fix significantly improves agent API clarity
Simplified propagation call makes pipeline easier to understand
Documentation updates make agent behavior clearer
Well-documented constants help maintainers understand design
Solution documentation is comprehensive and helpful
